batch_objective: Screen-upgrades Batch A (from prototypes/screen_upgrades.HANDOFF-PLAN.md): visual data-insight layer across five screens, keeping current skeletons. Foundation increment (new non-frozen s19_app/tui/insight_style.py helpers + app-wide navy/pastel theme in styles.tcss) + Workspace MID (border titles, entropy memstrip, section micro-bars, classed hex bytes, loader-facts in stats) + A2L Explorer MID (colored/zebra table + detail card over _a2l_enriched_tags) + MAC View MID (status-glyph column + coverage X-of-Y strip) + Memory Map BIG (pastel bands + hatch gaps + address ruler + sym-count rows + region inspector w/ hex peek). Render-level only; no parser/engine change. Issues Report PARKED. Patch Editor BIG deferred to Batch B.
standing_authorization: BATCH-47 KICKOFF (2026-07-15, AskUserQuestion): (1) SCOPE = Batch A only (Foundation + Workspace MID + A2L MID + MAC MID + Map BIG; Patch Editor BIG = Batch B, decide after A closes). (2) RUN MODE = AUTONOMOUS THROUGH SELF-MERGE (same gated model as batch-46): agent runs Phases 1->6 autonomously with a 7-section review packet in-conversation at each phase gate AND each Phase-3 increment gate, self-approving with a named Coverage/Certainty/Evidence axis check, to 'PR opened + CI green'; then a FINAL independent PR-level qa-reviewer pass over the WHOLE merged diff vs main (dual traceability intact, 0 engine-frozen diffs incl. frozen TEST files, no cross-increment regression via C-26, every gate carry discharged) MUST come back clean; only then merge, then /dev-flow-sync. A HIGH final-QA finding BLOCKS the merge and returns to operator. Snapshot regen = canonical-CI follow-up PR post-merge (local regen FORBIDDEN, reference_snapshot_regen_env). (3) THEME = app-wide navy/pastel via styles.tcss, flagged as its own foundation increment. (4) Batch B decision deferred until Batch A closes. DECISION-RECORDING (operator ack via selections): every autonomous decision -> PLAN.md log + decisions_log + 05-postmortem + vault at sync. PER-BATCH; NEVER carried from batch-46.
